ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic event */,
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Autonomous System (ASN) */,
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IP prefix */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of traffic for the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source of the traffic event */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination of the traffic event */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number used in the traffic event */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packets in bytes */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the traffic event in seconds */,
  "is_suspicious" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the event is suspicious */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_asn_id FOREIGN KEY ("asn_id") REFERENCES asns ("asn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_prefix_id FOREIGN KEY ("prefix_id") REFERENCES prefixes ("prefix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asns" (
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASN */,
  "asn_number" TEXT /* ASN number (e.g., AS18101) */,
  "ASN_name" TEXT /* Name of the ASN */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization that owns the ASN */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the ASN is registered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the ASN */,
  "asn_type" TEXT /* Type of ASN (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2, Content Provider) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the ASN was established */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the ASN record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asns_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prefixes" (
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP prefix */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* IP prefix (e.g., 103.12.124.0/22) */,
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Autonomous System (ASN) the prefix belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prefix */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prefix (e.g., active, reserved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prefix record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prefix record was last updated */,
  "prefix_type" TEXT /* Type of prefix (e.g., public, private) */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the prefix was allocated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the prefix record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prefixes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report detail was last updated */,
  "is_anomalous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the traffic event in the report is anomalous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES traffic_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role is active */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session record was last updated */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in minutes */,
  "is_terminated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the session was terminated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic event associated with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., high traffic, low traffic, suspicious activity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly record was last updated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the anomaly has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anomaly associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the alert has been read */,
  "is_escalated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the alert has been escalated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission is associated with (e.g., traffic_events, reports) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action allowed (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the permission is active */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the permission record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
